transcript.text: Come on, I dare you. Dislike this video. You can't, can't you? You may have noticed by now that the thumbs up button has turned into a heart, but the thumbs down button has completely vanished from YouTube Shorts. So, how do you express your displeasure at something you're watching? Well, it's a little more complicated now. First, you need to tap the three dots at the top of the screen, then tap not interested, and then give a reason why. And while that might mean you may see less of these types of shorts, I don't think it actually dislikes the video. Granted, our channel didn't get that many dislikes anyway, but since the change, the number of dislikes has plummeted, sometimes even into minus numbers. So, I guess if you can't dislike the video, you might as well
